glosses.ja: ふつうは; たいてい

sentences.target: On finit normalement vers dix-huit heures.

translations.fr: On finit normalement vers dix-huit heures.
translations.es: Normalmente terminamos sobre las seis de la tarde.
translations.de: Wir sind normalerweise gegen 18 Uhr fertig.
translations.it: Di solito finiamo verso le diciotto.
translations.ko: 우리는 보통 오후 여섯 시쯤에 끝나요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们通常在下午六点左右下班。
translations.yue: 我哋通常係差唔多六點收工。
translations.ru: Мы обычно заканчиваем около шести вечера.
translations.pt: Normalmente terminamos por volta das seis da tarde.
translations.he: אנחנו בדרך כלל מסיימים בסביבות שש בערב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thường kết thúc vào khoảng 6 giờ tối.
translations.ar: نحن عادةً ننتهي حوالي السادسة مساءً.
translations.nl: We zijn normaal gesproken rond zes uur klaar.
translations.uk: Ми зазвичай закінчуємо близько шостої вечора.
translations.hi: हम आमतौर पर शाम करीब छह बजे खत्म करते हैं.
translations.el: Συνήθως τελειώνουμε γύρω στις έξι το απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Vi blir vanligvis ferdige rundt klokka seks.
translations.id: Kami biasanya selesai sekitar pukul enam sore.
translations.sv: Vi brukar bli klara runt klockan sex.
translations.ro: De obicei terminăm în jur de ora șase seara.
translations.da: Vi bliver normalt færdige omkring klokken seks.
translations.fi: Yleensä lopetamme noin kello kuudelta illalla.
translations.ja: ふつうは午後6時ごろに終わります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (3rd person singular), often used for general statements or colloquial 'we'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses the action of finishing.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates habitual/typical manner or frequency.
Preposition meaning 'around/towards'; introduces an approximate time.
Cardinal number specifying '18'.
Common noun (plural); denotes clock time in conjunction with a number.

sentences.target: Tu viens normalement le mardi soir.

translations.fr: Tu viens normalement le mardi soir.
translations.en: You usually come on Tuesday evenings.
translations.es: Normalmente vienes los martes por la noche.
translations.it: Di solito vieni il martedì sera.
translations.yue: 你通常喺星期二夜晚嚟。
translations.ru: Ты обычно приходишь по вторникам вечером.
translations.pt: Você normalmente vem às terças à noite.
translations.he: אתה בדרך כלל מגיע בימי שלישי בערב.
translations.vi: Bạn thường đến vào tối thứ Ba.
translations.uk: Ти зазвичай приходиш у вівторок ввечері.
translations.hi: तुम आमतौर पर मंगलवार की शाम को आते हो.
translations.el: Συνήθως έρχεσαι τις Τρίτες το βράδυ.
translations.id: Kamu biasanya datang pada Selasa malam.
translations.ja: ふつうは火曜日の夜に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (2nd person singular).
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; denotes the action of coming.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates usual/habitual occurrence.
Definite article (masculine singular); with days of the week, marks habitual time ('on Tuesdays').
Common noun naming the day of the week; part of the temporal noun phrase.
Common noun; specifies time of day, forming 'le mardi soir' (Tuesday evening).

sentences.target: Nous ouvrons normalement à huit heures.

translations.fr: Nous ouvrons normalement à huit heures.
translations.en: We usually open at eight o'clock.
translations.de: Wir öffnen normalerweise um acht Uhr.
translations.ko: 우리는 보통 여덟 시에 문을 엽니다.
translations.ru: Мы обычно открываемся в восемь часов.
translations.he: אנחנו בדרך כלל פותחים בשעה שמונה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thường mở cửa lúc tám giờ.
translations.ar: نحن عادةً نفتح في الساعة الثامنة.
translations.nl: We gaan meestal om acht uur open.
translations.hi: हम आमतौर पर आठ बजे खोलते हैं.
translations.ro: De obicei deschidem la ora opt.
translations.ja: ふつうは8時に開店します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person plural).
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; denotes the action of opening.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates typical manner/frequency.
Preposition marking a specific time.
Cardinal number specifying '8'.
Common noun (plural); denotes clock time with a number.

translations.de: Sie sind normalerweise vor Mittag fertig.
translations.it: Di solito finiscono prima di mezzogiorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 她们通常在中午之前结束。
translations.yue: 佢哋通常喺中午之前完成。
translations.pt: Normalmente elas terminam antes do meio-dia.
translations.he: הן בדרך כלל מסיימות לפני הצהריים.
translations.vi: Họ thường hoàn thành trước trưa.
translations.nl: Ze zijn meestal klaar voor de middag.
translations.hi: वे आमतौर पर दोपहर से पहले खत्म कर देती हैं.
translations.nb: De blir vanligvis ferdige før klokka tolv.
translations.id: Mereka biasanya selesai sebelum tengah hari.
translations.sv: De brukar bli klara före tolv.
translations.ro: De obicei termină înainte de prânz.
translations.da: De bliver normalt færdige før klokken tolv.
translations.ja: ふつうは正午前に終わります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person plural, feminine).
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; expresses the action of finishing.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates typical/habitual manner.
Preposition meaning 'before'; introduces a temporal complement.
Common noun denoting 'noon'; time-of-day noun used without an article.
